TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Namasia Itini i Kaohsiung ko Namasia. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 172.33 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 117.75 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 38.04 km²), 3,027 ko tamdaw i Namasia, 813 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 2,691 a tamdaw, pakaala to 89%(Bunun布農族, Hla'alua拉阿魯哇族, Kanakanavu卡那卡那富族) no polong no tamdaw. o Bunun, Hla'alua, Kanakanavu ko sa'alomanay i Kaohsiung. O kasaniyarona 3 ko cun, 4 ko niyaro' i Namasia. Nangnisalu , Maia/Mangacun/Mangacun , Takanua /Takanua , Masinghalan .
S.PHON: namasia itini i kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u namasia. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i namasia, *** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un***, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua*****, kanakanab~vo~u~u******) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua, kanakanab~vo~u~u ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i kao~uħsio~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, * ko~u nijaro~uʡ i namasia. naŋnisaɾo~u~u , maia/maŋaʦo~u~un/maŋaʦo~u~un , takano~u~ua /takano~u~ua , masiŋħaɾan .
S.FORM: Namasia Itini i Kaohsiung ko Namasia. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 172.33 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 117.75 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 38.04 km²), 3,027 ko tamdaw i Namasia, 813 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 2,691 a tamdaw, pakaala to 89%(Bunun布農族, Hla'alua拉阿魯哇族, Kanakanavu卡那卡那富族) no polong no tamdaw. o Bunun, Hla'alua, Kanakanavu ko sa'alomanay i Kaohsiung. O kasaniyarona 3 ko cun, 4 ko niyaro' i Namasia. Nangnisalu , Maia/Mangacun/Mangacun , Takanua /Takanua , Masinghalan .
S.PHON: namasia itini i kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u namasia. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i namasia, *** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un***, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua*****, kanakanab~vo~u~u******) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua, kanakanab~vo~u~u ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i kao~uħsio~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, * ko~u nijaro~uʡ i namasia. naŋnisaɾo~u~u , maia/maŋaʦo~u~un/maŋaʦo~u~un , takano~u~ua /takano~u~ua , masiŋħaɾan .
